name: portfolio-platform
description: Full-stack portfolio SaaS platform — public site, admin dashboard, customer portal

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "proxy,api,public,admin,customer" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green,magenta,blue" --kill-others-on-fail "node dev-proxy/index.js" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix apps/public" "npm run dev --prefix apps/admin" "npm run dev --prefix apps/customer"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix apps/public && npm install --prefix apps/admin && npm install --prefix apps/customer && npm install --prefix dev-proxy
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix apps/public && npm run build --prefix apps/admin && npm run build --prefix apps/customer && node scripts/post-build.js
